summary: A Fox News Channel broadcast clip with 'FOX NEWS ALERT' chyrons covering the murder of Loyola student Sheridan Gorman, including on-the-street student interviews and the Gorman family statement. It is a raw cable-news segment reposted, not produced or music-driven entertainment.
notable_text: ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT SUSPECTED OF MURDERING SHERIDAN GORMAN MAKES FIRST COURT APPEARANCE; GORMAN FAMILY STATEMENT
